---
title: "About"
---

## Yeison Armando Buitrago López

I am a Data Scientist based in Bogotá, Colombia, working at the intersection of statistics, machine learning, and real business problems. Currently at **Habi**, where I design price elasticity models and A/B experiments for the Colombian real estate market.

I hold a degree in **Mathematics from Universidad Distrital FJC** (honor roll for four semesters) and am completing a **Statistics Specialization at Universidad Nacional de Colombia**, where I wrote a preprint on urban segregation in Bogotá.

---

## Experience

**Habi Colombia** — *Mid Data Scientist*
`Aug 2025 – Present`

- Design and deployment of price elasticity models across the offer portfolio.
- Bayesian A/B testing with custom experimental design to increase contribution margin.
- Redesign of reference price data sources to improve client value proposition.

---

**Habi Colombia** — *Junior Data Scientist*
`Mar 2024 – Aug 2025`

- Automation and production deployment of geospatial pipelines in Python and BigQuery (GCP).
- Predictive models on real estate data for bank credit origination.
- Introduction of A/B testing as an organizational practice; stakeholder communication via dashboards.

---

**Frubana Colombia** — *Demand Planning Specialist*
`Nov 2022 – Feb 2024`

- Demand forecasting models over thousands of SKUs at a mass-consumption company (Python + SQL).
- Integration and processing of data from multiple operational and commercial sources.
- Internal tool for supply chain analysts to detect atypical demand patterns.

---

## Education

**Universidad Nacional de Colombia** — Statistics Specialization
`2025 – 2026` · Bogotá

**Universidad Distrital FJC** — B.Sc. Mathematics
`2017 – 2022` · Bogotá · Honor roll (4 semesters, Top 10%)

---

## Technical Skills

| Area | Tools |
|------|-------|
| **Languages** | Python (pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, Optuna), SQL, BigQuery |
| **ML & Statistics** | Predictive models, Bayesian A/B testing, price elasticity analysis, inferential statistics |
| **ETL & Cloud** | Python/SQL pipelines, GCP, BigQuery, data workflow automation |
| **BI & Viz** | Redash, Streamlit, Kepler.gl |
| **Tools** | Git, GitHub |
| **Languages** | Spanish (native), English (intermediate) |

---

## Certifications

- **Deep Learning Specialization** — Coursera (Andrew Ng): neural networks, optimization, time series, TensorFlow
- Introduction to Data Science — Coursera
- Science Communication — Sociedad Matemática Mexicana (2021)

---

## Contact

📧 [buitragolopezyeison@gmail.com](mailto:buitragolopezyeison@gmail.com)
💼 [linkedin.com/in/yeisonabl](https://linkedin.com/in/yeisonabl)
🐙 [github.com/YeisonBL](https://github.com/YeisonBL)
